{{Quote|We caught her all alone, hopping across the void... nervy, but foolish.|Crimson Jack on the capture of Leia Organa's space cruiser|<ref name="Star Wars (1977) 11">[[Star Wars (1977) 11|''Star Wars'' (1977) 11]]</ref>}}
This '''small space cruiser''' was used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] for general transportation. [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] used this cruiser to leave [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]] in search of [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], who had gone missing while searching for a new location for the Rebel base and was eventually captured by [[Crimson Jack/Legends|Crimson Jack]] before she could find him. The vessel required a single pilot to be operated.

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Leiaalternate.jpg|thumb|left|150px|The ship as illustrated in issue 11.]]
In [[Star Wars (1977) 10|''Star Wars'' 10]], this ship has certain design elements hinting at a [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]] origin. The ship's appearance in [[Star Wars (1977) 11|issue 11]] differs radically from the previous issue, and an "S" or "5" appears on the hull.
